category_sources: Official GitHub README describes n8n-MCP as a Model Context Protocol server for AI assistants and n8n workflow automation.
source_facts.description says it is an MCP for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Windsurf, and Cursor to build n8n workflows.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses n8n-MCP.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README and docs/N8N_DEPLOYMENT.md provide setup and deployment documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official project site and documentation entry point.
repo_sources: Official GitHub search result and package metadata identify czlonkowski/n8n-mcp as the project repository.
source_facts.repo is empty; official project site links to GitHub.
tags_sources: Official README describes AI assistants, n8n nodes, documentation access, templates, and workflow validation.
source_facts.description identifies MCP, n8n, and AI coding tools.
